name: Animated List
description: Spring-animated list items that slide in with staggered timing. Great for feature lists, agenda items, and step-by-step breakdowns.

name: Animated Text
description: Per-character text animation with spring physics - each letter drops in with rotation. Ideal for titles, brand names, and impact statements.

name: Bounce Text
description: Headline with bounce-in animation and gradient card background. Perfect for announcements, CTAs, and section openers.

name: Bubble Pop Text
description: Letters appear inside bubbles with a springy pop-in effect. Eye-catching for short words, brand names, and social media hooks.

name: Card Flip
description: 3D card flip animation with front and back faces. Great for reveal moments, before/after, and two-sided information.

name: Floating Bubble
description: Text floats inside a glowing bubble with a gentle bobbing motion. Ideal for callouts, featured quotes, and attention-grabbing labels.

name: Geometric Patterns
description: Rotating concentric geometric shapes that morph and scale. Works as a background layer, intro sequence, or abstract visual break.

name: Glitch Text
description: RGB-split glitch effect with chromatic aberration on text. High-impact for tech intros, error screens, and cyberpunk aesthetics.

name: Liquid Wave
description: Flowing liquid wave animation using SVG paths. Mesmerizing background for music, wellness, and ambient content.

name: Matrix Rain
description: Falling character rain effect inspired by the Matrix. Great for tech intros, code-themed content, and developer branding.

name: Particle Explosion
description: Particle burst that radiates outward from center with rotating motion. Perfect for celebration moments, reveals, and impact screens.

name: Pulsing Text
description: Characters pulse with a rhythmic glow effect. Hypnotic animation for music content, meditation apps, and ambient loops.

name: Slide Text
description: Clean slide-in text animation with spring physics. The simplest building block - use it as a title card, lower third, or transition.

name: Sound Wave
description: Animated audio bar visualization that pulses rhythmically. Ideal for podcast intros, music content, and audiogram-style videos.

name: Typewriter Subtitle
description: Typewriter-style text reveal with a blinking cursor. Classic effect for code demos, terminal aesthetics, and dramatic text reveals.

name: Client Report
description: Professional weekly and monthly client reports with KPI cards, progress bars, status indicators, and executive summaries. Show project health at a glance.

name: Project Timeline
description: Visual project timelines with milestones, phase markers, dependency arrows, and progress tracking. Gantt-style layouts for client presentations.

name: Client Welcome
description: Onboarding presentations for new clients with team intros, process overview, communication guidelines, and project kickoff agenda slides.

name: Scope Change
description: Formal scope change request videos with impact analysis, timeline adjustments, cost implications, and approval workflows. Professional change management.

name: Rate Card
description: Service pricing presentations with tier comparison, hourly vs project rates, package breakdowns, and value proposition layouts. Close deals faster.

name: Meeting Recap
description: Post-meeting summary videos with action items, decisions made, attendee highlights, and next steps. Send instead of meeting notes.

name: Results Showcase
description: Client ROI and results presentations with before/after metrics, growth charts, achievement highlights, and impact summaries. Prove your value.

name: Service Overview
description: One-pager style service descriptions with capability lists, tech stack icons, process diagrams, and call-to-action sections. Perfect for LinkedIn or proposals.

name: Listicle
description: Numbered lists, tips, and step-by-step content for social media

name: Quote Card
description: Inspirational quotes, testimonials, and text-focused social posts

name: Tip of the Day
description: Daily tip videos with numbered tip format

name: Announcement
description: Eye-catching announcement videos for launches and updates

name: Stat Counter
description: Animated statistics and metrics with number counters

name: Call to Action
description: Compelling CTA videos for engagement and conversions

name: GRWM Reel
description: Get Ready With Me — 4-scene auto-cut portrait reel (8s) with platform-safe captions, step counter sticker badge, and ConfettiBurst on the final outfit reveal.

name: Outfit Reveal
description: Hero outfit shot with WavyText headline, AnimatedSparkles, and a StickerBadge brand callout. Two visual flavors: hot pink neon energy or soft pastel dream.

name: Festival Lineup
description: Concert and festival lineup announcement — WavyText hero name, date, venue, and up to 8 artists in a staggered 2-column grid. Neon purple-pink or warm sunset gradient overlays.

name: Creator Recap
description: Week-in-review portrait montage — 5 quick scenes with sticker day badges, platform-correct captions, and a BlobShape creator handle outro.
